mapper.sql: L_RULE_NO, VC_RULE_CODE, VC_RULE_DESCIBE, C_RULE_TYPE, C_LEGAL_TYPE, C_RULE_RANGE, C_FACT_TYPE, VC_NUMERATOR_CODE, C_NUMERATOR_CNT_TYPE, VC_NUMERATOR_PARM, VC_DENOMINATOR_CODE, C_DENOMINATOR_CNT_TYPE, VC_DENOMINATOR_PARM, VC_GROUP_CODE, VC_SUB_RULE_RELATION, C_COMPARE_TYPE1, EN_VAL1_UP, EN_VAL1_LOW, C_VIOLATE_TYPE1, C_COMPARE_TYPE2, EN_VAL2_UP, EN_VAL2_LOW, C_VIOLATE_TYPE2, C_COMPARE_TYPE3, EN_VAL3_UP, EN_VAL3_LOW, C_VIOLATE_TYPE3, L_ADJUST_LIMIT, C_VALID_STATUS, L_VALID_BEGINDATE, L_VALID_ENDDATE, D_CREATE_TIME, D_MODIFY_TIME, VC_CREATE_OPERATOR, VC_MODIFY_OPERATOR, VC_REMARK, VC_EXTEND_INFO
mapper.insert: insert into T_COMP_RISKRULE (L_RULE_NO, VC_RULE_CODE, VC_RULE_DESCIBE, C_RULE_TYPE, C_LEGAL_TYPE, C_RULE_RANGE, C_FACT_TYPE, VC_NUMERATOR_CODE, C_NUMERATOR_CNT_TYPE, VC_NUMERATOR_PARM, VC_DENOMINATOR_CODE, C_DENOMINATOR_CNT_TYPE, VC_DENOMINATOR_PARM, VC_GROUP_CODE, VC_SUB_RULE_RELATION, C_COMPARE_TYPE1, EN_VAL1_UP, EN_VAL1_LOW, C_VIOLATE_TYPE1, C_COMPARE_TYPE2, EN_VAL2_UP, EN_VAL2_LOW, C_VIOLATE_TYPE2, C_COMPARE_TYPE3, EN_VAL3_UP, EN_VAL3_LOW, C_VIOLATE_TYPE3, L_ADJUST_LIMIT, C_VALID_STATUS, L_VALID_BEGINDATE, L_VALID_ENDDATE, D_CREATE_TIME, D_MODIFY_TIME, VC_CREATE_OPERATOR, VC_MODIFY_OPERATOR, VC_REMARK, VC_EXTEND_INFO) values (#{lRuleNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{vcRuleCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcRuleDescibe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cRuleType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cLegalType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cRuleRange,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cFactType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcNumeratorCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cNumeratorCntType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcNumeratorParm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcDenominatorCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cDenominatorCntType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcDenominatorParm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcGroupCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcSubRuleRelation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cCompareType1,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enVal1Up,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enVal1Low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cViolateType1,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cCompareType2,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enVal2Up,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enVal2Low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cViolateType2,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{cCompareType3,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{enVal3Up,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{enVal3Low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cViolateType3,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lAdjustLimit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cValidStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{lValidBegindate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{lValidEnddate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{dCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{dModifyTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{vcCreateOperator,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcModifyOperator,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{vcRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vcExtendInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update T_COMP_RISKRULE set VC_RULE_CODE = #{vcRuleCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, VC_RULE_DESCIBE = #{vcRuleDescibe,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, C_RULE_TYPE = #{cRuleType,jdbcType=CHAR}, C_LEGAL_TYPE = #{cLegalType,jdbcType=CHAR}, C_RULE_RANGE = #{cRuleRange,jdbcType=CHAR}, C_FACT_TYPE = #{cFactType,jdbcType=CHAR}, VC_NUMERATOR_CODE = #{vcNumeratorCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, C_NUMERATOR_CNT_TYPE = #{cNumeratorCntType,jdbcType=CHAR}, VC_NUMERATOR_PARM = #{vcNumeratorParm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VC_DENOMINATOR_CODE = #{vcDenominatorCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, C_DENOMINATOR_CNT_TYPE = #{cDenominatorCntType,jdbcType=CHAR}, VC_DENOMINATOR_PARM = #{vcDenominatorParm,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VC_GROUP_CODE = #{vcGroupCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, VC_SUB_RULE_RELATION = #{vcSubRuleRelation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, C_COMPARE_TYPE1 = #{cCompareType1,jdbcType=CHAR}, EN_VAL1_UP = #{enVal1Up,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EN_VAL1_LOW = #{enVal1Low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, C_VIOLATE_TYPE1 = #{cViolateType1,jdbcType=CHAR}, C_COMPARE_TYPE2 = #{cCompareType2,jdbcType=CHAR}, EN_VAL2_UP = #{enVal2Up,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EN_VAL2_LOW = #{enVal2Low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, C_VIOLATE_TYPE2 = #{cViolateType2,jdbcType=CHAR}, C_COMPARE_TYPE3 = #{cCompareType3,jdbcType=CHAR}, EN_VAL3_UP = #{enVal3Up,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, EN_VAL3_LOW = #{enVal3Low,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, C_VIOLATE_TYPE3 = #{cViolateType3,jdbcType=CHAR}, L_ADJUST_LIMIT = #{lAdjustLimit,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, C_VALID_STATUS = #{cValidStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, L_VALID_BEGINDATE = #{lValidBegindate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, L_VALID_ENDDATE = #{lValidEnddate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, D_CREATE_TIME = #{dCreateTime,jdbcType=DATE}, D_MODIFY_TIME = #{dModifyTime,jdbcType=DATE}, VC_CREATE_OPERATOR = #{vcCreateOperator,jdbcType=CHAR}, VC_MODIFY_OPERATOR = #{vcModifyOperator,jdbcType=CHAR}, VC_REMARK = #{vcRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, VC_EXTEND_INFO = #{vcExtendInfo,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where L_RULE_NO = #{lRuleNo,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
mapper.select: select L_FUND_ID fund_id,VC_FUND_NAME fund_name from TRADE.TFUNDINFO

select L_FUND_ID fundId,VC_FUND_NAME fundName from TRADE.TFUNDINFO
and VC_FUND_NAME like CONCAT(#{word},'%') or L_FUND_ID like CONCAT(#{word},'%')
select distinct VC_PORT_TYPE_1 type1 from PRT_PORTINFO

select distinct VC_PORT_TYPE_2 type2 from PRT_PORTINFO
and VC_PORT_TYPE_1 = #{type1}

select.if:
select a.LOG_NO, a.VC_RULE_CODE, a.UPDATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_TYPE, a.UPDATE_EXPLAIN, a.L_OPERATOR_NO, a.VC_OPTYPE, a.VC_REMARKS, a.L_MODIFY_DATE, a.IS_UNIFYCOMP, a.VC_REASON, a.VC_BATCH, to_char(a.UPDATE_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as update_time_str, to_char(a.L_MODIFY_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as modify_date_str,
d.VC_ITEM_NAME as tmlx,t.VC_NAME as opname,m.VC_SUMMARY as tmms from T_COMP_RULESLOG a left join T_COMP_COMPARETYPES t on t.VC_STOCK_O32 = to_char(a.L_OPERATOR_NO) and t.vc_type = '2' join TRADE.TRISKCONTROL m on m.L_SERIAL_NO = a.VC_RULE_CODE join T_COMP_RISKRULE b on a.VC_RULE_CODE = b.VC_RULE_CODE join T_BASE_DICTIONARY d on b.C_FACT_TYPE = d.VC_ITEM_VALUE and d.L_DICTIONARY_NO =100004

select a.LOG_NO, a.VC_RULE_CODE, a.UPDATE_TIME, a.UPDATE_TYPE, a.UPDATE_EXPLAIN, a.L_OPERATOR_NO, a.VC_OPTYPE, a.VC_REMARKS, a.L_MODIFY_DATE, a.IS_UNIFYCOMP, a.VC_REASON, a.VC_BATCH, to_char(a.UPDATE_TIME,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as update_time_str, to_char(a.L_MODIFY_DATE,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss') as modify_date_str, t.VC_NAME as opname,t.VC_STOCK_MD as tmlx,m.VC_SUMMARY as tmms from T_COMP_RULESLOG a left join T_COMP_COMPARETYPES t on t.VC_STOCK_O32 = to_char(a.L_OPERATOR_NO) and t.vc_type = '2' join TRADE.TRISKCONTROL m on m.L_SERIAL_NO = a.VC_RULE_CODE

mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, b.* FROM T_COMP_RISKRULE a INNER JOIN T_COMP_RULEFACTEXPRESS b on a.L_RULE_NO = b.L_RULE_NO where a.L_RULE_NO in
#{ruleId}

SELECT a.*, b.*, c.* FROM T_COMP_RISKRULE a INNER JOIN T_COMP_RULEFACTEXPRESS b ON a.L_RULE_NO = b.L_RULE_NO AND a.C_RULE_RANGE = b.C_RULE_RANGE LEFT JOIN T_COMP_FACTFUNCCONFIG c ON b.C_FACT_CODE = c.C_FACT_CODE AND b.C_RULE_RANGE = c.C_RULE_RANGE AND b.C_EXPRESS_TYPE = c.C_EXPRESS_TYPE WHERE a.L_RULE_NO in
#{ruleId}
